## createNodeWorkspace() function

Creates a workspace with Node.js platform defaults. Uses nodeCryptoProvider for key store and encryption operations.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createNodeWorkspace(params?: IWorkspaceFactoryParams): Result<Workspace>;
```
